title: Maximum Probability Path
hints: Notice that maximizing the product of probabilities is similar to finding a shortest path, but the 'cost' accumulates multiplicatively rather than additively.
This problem can be solved using a variation of Dijkstra's algorithm, where you always expand the path with the highest current probability.
Maintain an array storing the best probability found so far to reach each node from the start, initializing the start node to 1.0 and all others to 0.0.
